posts.title: 2 in 3 small business owners lose sleep over their finances
posts.author: Ryan Hussey
posts.description: A survey of over 750 U.S. small business owners reveals that 71% experience significant financial stress affecting their sleep, decision-making, and personal income. The research identifies cash flow timing as the primary source of anxiety and shows that financial pressure is delaying business growth.

posts.title: How to identify and avoid spoofing attacks: Websites and email
posts.author: Erin Barry
posts.description: This article explores spoofing attacks where scammers disguise their digital communications as coming from a different entity to deceive victims. The guide covers identifying fraudulent emails and websites, understanding attack mechanics, and implementing protective measures for businesses.

posts.title: Best free business checking account for small businesses
posts.author: Ryan Hussey
posts.description: This guide compares top business checking accounts for small businesses in 2026, examining fees, interest rates, and features. It distinguishes between truly free accounts and accounts with hidden costs, contrasting online banking platforms with traditional banks.

posts.title: How Bigfoot Kick uses Bluevine to grow with confidence
posts.author: Ryan Hussey
posts.description: This case study examines how Bigfoot Kick, a Charlotte-based online apparel brand, leverages Bluevine's banking platform to streamline revenue collection, manage international vendor payments, and organize finances through sub-accounts as the business scales.
